title: India, Italy can expand cooperation in Africa through AI Hub and development initiatives: Ambassador Bartoli
description: India and Italy are set to boost their collaboration in Africa. An AI Hub for Sustainable Development is planned, alongside initiatives in farming, water, health, and education. This partnership aims to leverage artificial intelligence for the continent's progress. Both nations are strengthening ties across technology, defense, and critical minerals, fostering resilient supply chains and a rules-based international order.
content:

title: Amazon brings Ring’s best features to a much more affordable video doorbell
description: Amazon has just unveiled a fresh batch of Artificial Intelligence (AI)-powered features for its Blink security cameras, and they won't cost you a penny extra.
content:

title: AI is making blue collar workers like electricians, mechanics richer than office workers
description: Artificial intelligence is creating new, lucrative roles for skilled tradespeople in India, with demand for electricians, HVAC technicians, and robotics specialists surging. This 'labour flip' sees blue-collar wages growing faster than entry-level white-collar salaries, as AI's physical infrastructure requires human expertise for installation and maintenance.
content:

title: Courts cracking down on error-strewn AI-assisted legal briefs
description: When a US judge found fabricated quotes in a lawyer's brief earlier this year, the attorney admitted he had used Claude, an artificial intelligence chatbot, to write the document.
content:
LONDON: When a US judge found fabricated quotes in a lawyer's brief earlier this year, the attorney admitted he had used Claude, an artificial intelligence chatbot, to write the document.
That got him a fine and a mandatory course on how to use AI pr... [4763 chars]

title: How AI Is Reshaping India's IT Jobs: 30% Less Hirings, Vanishing Mid
description: New Delhi [India], June 15: A study conducted by FindMyCollege, covering more than 1 lakh active IT jobs in the current market, finds the pay ladder starting at a median of ₹2.6 LPA (lakhs per annum), rising to ₹25 LPA for experienced roles. However, a new mid-career band gap has emerged. This segment has also been historically the largest in the Indian IT sector, making up nearly 57% of the IT hirings in the market. But, currently, its getting strangled due to artificial intelligence consolidating many roles. The mid-level SDE segment has witnessed a dip of 11 per cent in hirings in just 12 months.
content:

title: Banks rush to hire million-dollar AI chiefs - even as experts predict the role's demise
description: Banks are paying up to $3.5 million to hire chief AI officers as the race to adopt artificial intelligence intensifies, but industry leaders say the role could eventually disappear as AI becomes embedded across all business functions

title: Why Squeezing Big Business Harder Won’t Close the UK Tax Gap
description: The UK’s tax authority should use artificial intelligence to monitor small and medium-sized businesses the way it does large corporations to help close the nation’s tax gap, Ryan’s Jenny Batchelor says.
content:
If the UK government is serious about closing the tax gap, it can’t do so by repeatedly squeezing the same companies. There is a more effective path. And it runs through AI.

title: KFSH Presents Applied Radiology AI Model at HLTH Europe 2026
description: AMSTERDAM, June 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- At HLTH Europe 2026, taking place in Amsterdam from June 15 to 18, King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research Centre (KFSH) is positioning radiology AI as one of the clearest examples of how artificial intelligence can move from promise to measurable clinical impact when it is built around real patient needs and embedded into clinical workflows.

title: Watch: Washington, Anthropic, and the AI kill switch-can Europe actually build tech independence?
description: Washington has just reminded Europe who really holds the power in the age of artificial intelligence. For Europe, this is a long-overdue wake-up call. But will it actually wake up?
